--- insert_on_conflict_subquery.sql
INSERT INTO foo (foo, bar) (SELECT foo, bar FROM bar) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
--- AST
&ast.Insert{
  TableName: &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 12,
        NameEnd: 15,
        Name:    "foo",
      },
    },
  },
  Columns: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 17,
      NameEnd: 20,
      Name:    "foo",
    },
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 22,
      NameEnd: 25,
      Name:    "bar",
    },
  },
  Input: &ast.SubQueryInput{
    Query: &ast.SubQuery{
      Lparen: 27,
      Rparen: 52,
      Query:  &ast.Select{
        Select:  28,
        Results: []ast.SelectItem{
          &ast.ExprSelectItem{
            Expr: &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 35,
              NameEnd: 38,
              Name:    "foo",
            },
          },
          &ast.ExprSelectItem{
            Expr: &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 40,
              NameEnd: 43,
              Name:    "bar",
            },
          },
        },
        From: &ast.From{
          From:   44,
          Source: &ast.TableName{
            Table: &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 49,
              NameEnd: 52,
              Name:    "bar",
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  OnConflict: &ast.OnConflict{
    On:             54,
    ConflictAction: &ast.ConflictActionDoNothing{
      Do:      66,
      Nothing: 69,
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
INSERT INTO foo (foo, bar) (SELECT foo, bar FROM bar) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
